popularStory.description: The name of this ancient and noble family, which gave five knights of the shire to Cornwall, has been in different ages spelt in various ways; but l'Arcedekne, and Erchdeken seem to have been the most …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne於1360年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親John l'Achdecken55歲，母親Cecily Haccombe50歲。他於1383年之前與Elizabeth Talbot結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年12月10日之前在英國戴文哈可姆，埋葬在英國戴文哈可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne was born in 1360, in Cornwall, England, his father, John l'Achdecken, was 55 and his mother, Cecily Haccombe, was 50. He married Elizabeth Talbot before 1383. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died before 10 December 1400, in Haccombe, Devon, England, and was buried in Haccombe, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne est né en 1360, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, John l'Achdecken, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Cecily Haccombe, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Talbot avant 1383. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé avant 10 décembre 1400, à Haccombe, Devon, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Haccombe, Devon, Angleterre.

de.Ruan Lanihorne, Cornwall, England: Ruan Lanihorne, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne 1360 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John l'Achdecken 55 und seine Mutter Cecily Haccombe 50. Er hat vor 1383 Elizabeth Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb vor 10. Dezember 1400 in Haccombe, Devon, England und wurde in Haccombe, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne è nato il nel 1360 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, John l'Achdecken, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Haccombe, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Talbot prima del 1383. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì prima del 10 dicembre 1400, nel Haccombe, Devon, England, e fu sepolto a Haccombe, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekneが1360年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父John l'Achdeckenは55歳，母Cecily Haccombeは50歳であった。1383年以前にElizabeth Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年12月10日以前にイギリスデボンハッコインベで死去し，イギリスデボンハッコインベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne(이)가 1360년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John l'Achdecken(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Haccombe(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1383년 이전 Elizabeth Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 12월 10일 이전 영국 데폰 하치브에서 사망했으며 영국 데폰 하치브에 묻혔다.

pt.Ruan Lanihorne, Cornwall, England: Ruan Lanihorne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne nasceu em 1360, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, John l'Achdecken, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Haccombe, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Talbot antes 1383. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 10 de dezembro de 1400, em Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne родился в 1360 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени John l'Achdecken было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Haccombe, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Talbot перед 1383 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер перед 10 декабрь 1400 г. в местности хаккомб, девон, Англия и был похоронен в местности хаккомб, девон, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth Talbot antes de 1383. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió antes de 10 de diciembre de 1400, en Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra.
